headline: Is Baker Hughes (BKR) Pricing Look Interesting After Recent Pullback And DCF Upside Estimate
summary: If you are wondering whether Baker Hughes at around US$60.38 is offering fair value or stretching ahead of itself, you are not alone. The stock has seen a 3.2% decline over the last 7 days and a 3.5% decline over the last 30 days, while still showing a 28.1% return year to date and a 50.8% return over the last year. Recent coverage has focused on Baker Hughes as a key player in the energy services space, with attention on its role in major energy infrastructure and technology projects...

headline: US rig count up five as prices surge
summary: The rig count in the Permian Basin was up one this week, the latest count Thursday by Baker Hughes shows, with 242 rigs active in the region. A year ago, 294 rigs were active in the region. Nationally, the oil and gas rig count is up five from last week at 548 rigs. A year ago, 590 rigs were active. The count shows that 411 rigs sought oil, up two from the previous week, and 130 explored for ...
